name: Fairmarkit AI-Powered Sourcing Platform API
what_it_does: AI-powered strategic sourcing platform with REST API — enabling procurement teams to automate RFQ (Request for Quote) creation and supplier selection, discover new suppliers using AI recommendations, manage competitive bidding events, and address tail spend with automated sourcing recommendations, integrating with major procurement platforms (SAP Ariba, Coupa, Oracle).
use_cases: Automating RFQ creation and supplier invitation via Fairmarkit API for procurement workflow integration
Triggering AI-powered supplier discovery for specific categories via Fairmarkit API
Integrating Fairmarkit sourcing events with existing P2P systems (SAP Ariba, Coupa) via API
Querying sourcing event results and bid analytics via Fairmarkit API for procurement reporting
Automating tail spend sourcing recommendations based on purchase history via Fairmarkit API
not_for: Accounts payable and invoice processing (Fairmarkit is sourcing-focused, not AP)
Contract management (use Icertis, Ironclad, or Coupa for contract lifecycle management)
Simple purchase order management (Fairmarkit focuses on strategic sourcing, not PO management)
best_when: A procurement team with high tail spend volume needs AI to automate supplier discovery and competitive bidding for mid-range purchases ($5K-$500K) — where manual sourcing is too slow but strategic relationships don't exist.
avoid_when: You primarily do large strategic contracts (Fairmarkit is best for tail spend automation), have no existing procurement system, or need complete P2P coverage.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow for system integrations. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped with sourcing module access controls. Webhook for sourcing event lifecycle notifications (RFQ sent, bids received, award). REST API for sourcing automation. Integration with SAP Ariba, Coupa, Oracle via certified connectors. SAML SSO for enterprise identity management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; enterprise pricing only
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing; contact sales; typically $100K-500K/year based on spend volume
pricing.notes: Boston company. Founded 2017. Raised $35M Series B (2021). Backed by GGV Capital, Insight Partners, Touchdown Ventures (Walmart). AI-first sourcing platform with supplier recommendation engine trained on $100B+ in spend data. Used by Hologic, EDP, Vestas Wind Systems. Tail spend automation is core use case — automating the 80% of transactions not worth manual sourcing. Integration with Coupa, SAP Ariba, Oracle is key for enterprise adoption.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for sourcing event automation. OAuth2 client credentials auth. Moderate documentation — enterprise focus with integration guides. Webhook for sourcing lifecycle events. SAP Ariba/Coupa/Oracle integration via connectors requires separate configuration. Enterprise implementation timeline before API integration is meaningful.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Sourcing event reads fully idempotent. Supplier query reads idempotent. Bid reads idempotent. RFQ creation requires external ID for idempotency.
known_agent_gotchas: AI supplier recommendations require training data — new accounts need spend data import first
Integration with SAP Ariba/Coupa requires separate connector configuration
Enterprise annual contract required — significant investment before production use
Tail spend optimization requires historical spend data to generate recommendations
Sourcing events are asynchronous — bidding periods run over days, not seconds

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US and EU data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Sourcing data is highly sensitive (supplier pricing, bid amounts, competitive information) — strict access controls required. Supplier bid data must be protected from premature disclosure. SAML SSO for enterprise identity. Walmart Ventures backing adds enterprise security expectations.
